title: tragacantha calycosa
intro: Tragacantha calycosa, also known as the sensitive plant, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family that is native to tropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to help soothe wounds and reduce pain. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure and improving digestion, due to its rich content of antioxidants and other nutrients. Tragacantha calycosa is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to promote relaxation and reduce stress, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
